description: Ground-truth labeled episodes for EVAL-008: A/B eval of reflect_heuristic vs reflect_via_provider. Labels are the expected ErrorPattern from reflection.rs.

episodes.intended_goal: Rename the file config.prod.toml to config.backup.toml
episodes.observed_outcome: Called rename_file with source path /etc/app/config.prod.toml — tool returned: invalid argument: /etc/app/config.prod.toml does not exist
episodes.label: tool_misuse

episodes.intended_goal: Read the deployment manifest and extract the image tag
episodes.observed_outcome: Called read_file with path /deployments/ — tool returned: permission denied: cannot read directory as file
tool_errors: permission denied: cannot read directory as file
episodes.label: tool_misuse

episodes.intended_goal: Write test results to report.json
episodes.observed_outcome: Called write_file with content that exceeded the schema — tool returned: validation error: content must be a JSON object, got string
tool_errors: validation error: content must be a JSON object, got string
episodes.label: tool_misuse

episodes.intended_goal: Fetch the CI status from GitHub
episodes.observed_outcome: HTTP request to api.github.com timed out after 30 seconds. No response received.
episodes.label: tool_failure

episodes.intended_goal: Query the analytics database for daily active users
episodes.observed_outcome: Database query did not complete. Connection timed out.
tool_errors: connection timeout: database did not respond
episodes.label: tool_failure

episodes.intended_goal: Post a message to the Slack webhook
episodes.observed_outcome: Tool returned circuit-breaker open: too many failures in past 60 seconds. Backed off.
episodes.label: external_failure

episodes.intended_goal: Fetch pricing data from the third-party API
episodes.observed_outcome: API responded with 429 Too Many Requests. Rate limit exceeded.
episodes.label: external_failure

episodes.intended_goal: Search for recent customer feedback entries
episodes.observed_outcome: I would call the search_memories tool here to find the relevant entries, but the query parameters are unclear.
episodes.label: narrated_instead_of_acted

episodes.intended_goal: Apply the patch to fix the login bug
episodes.observed_outcome: I'll try to apply the patch using patch_file, but let me check the file format first.
episodes.label: narrated_instead_of_acted

episodes.intended_goal: Update the configuration value for max_connections
episodes.observed_outcome: I could update the TOML file directly, but I need to verify the current value first — let me think through this.
episodes.label: narrated_instead_of_acted

episodes.intended_goal: Delete all log files older than 30 days from /var/log/app/
episodes.observed_outcome: The goal is not clear — it's ambiguous whether 'older than 30 days' means by creation or modification time.
episodes.label: unresolved_ambiguity

episodes.intended_goal: Summarize the recent changes
episodes.observed_outcome: Unclear what scope you want summarized — the task is ambiguous about which repository or time range.
episodes.label: unresolved_ambiguity

episodes.intended_goal: Generate a report for Q1 2026
episodes.observed_outcome: The request is not clear — should the report cover sales, engineering metrics, or customer support? Format is also unspecified.
episodes.label: unresolved_ambiguity

episodes.intended_goal: Retry the failed build until it passes
episodes.observed_outcome: Reached max iterations (10) without convergence. The build keeps failing for the same reason.
episodes.label: budget_exhausted

episodes.intended_goal: Resolve the circular import error in the codebase
episodes.observed_outcome: Task exceeded budget — used 20 out of 20 allowed steps without reaching a solution.
episodes.label: budget_exhausted

episodes.intended_goal: Iteratively improve the draft until feedback score > 0.8
episodes.observed_outcome: Ran out of iteration budget after 15 steps. Feedback score plateaued at 0.72.
episodes.label: budget_exhausted

episodes.intended_goal: Find and fix the broken unit test
episodes.observed_outcome: Agent looped on same tool — called run_tests 7 times in a row without making changes between calls.
episodes.label: nonconvergent_loop

episodes.intended_goal: Optimize the slow database query
episodes.observed_outcome: Kept calling explain_query 5 times with identical inputs. Same tool, same result, no convergence.
episodes.label: nonconvergent_loop

episodes.intended_goal: Summarize the failing unit tests in the test suite
episodes.observed_outcome: Successfully ran all 342 tests and reported pass/fail counts: 341 passed, 1 failed. Did not produce a summary of the failing tests.
episodes.label: misinterpreted_goal

episodes.intended_goal: Move the logs to the archive folder for backup
episodes.observed_outcome: Deleted all files in /var/log/app/ since backing up means removing old data. No files were copied to archive.
episodes.label: misinterpreted_goal

episodes.intended_goal: Return the list of active users from the API
episodes.observed_outcome: Called the users endpoint and received a valid 200 response. However, the response body contained an empty array instead of the expected user objects. Returned the empty list without investigation.
episodes.label: unexpected_tool_output

episodes.intended_goal: Parse the configuration file and extract the database host
episodes.observed_outcome: Called read_file successfully on config.toml but the returned content was binary garbage rather than TOML text. Attempted to parse it anyway and failed silently.
episodes.label: unexpected_tool_output

episodes.intended_goal: Check whether the deployment succeeded
episodes.observed_outcome: The deployment status check returned an unexpected intermediate state that was not in the documented API schema. Agent could not map it to pass or fail.
episodes.label: unexpected_tool_output

episodes.intended_goal: Retrieve the last 5 error log entries
episodes.observed_outcome: Successfully retrieved and returned 5 log entries from the error log. All entries present.

episodes.intended_goal: Send a daily summary notification to the user
episodes.observed_outcome: Compiled the summary, formatted it as Markdown, and dispatched via the notification tool. Delivery confirmed.
